title: APAC Baby Pink Balloon Ribbon 500m
features: Attach these curling ribbons to your helium balloons to make sure they don@@t get away, These ribbons can also be attached to balloon weights
This product is supplied by APAC Packaging Limited with barcode
description: Product Description There are 500 meters (1640ft) of baby pink balloon ribbon on this spool. The ribbon measures 5mm in width and is perfect for attaching your balloons to a weight or chair back. This spool will anchor approximately 357 balloons (allowing 1.4m of ribbon per balloon). Box Contains curling ribbon
